title: Neco-Arc Cats
description: Replaces all cats with Neco-Arc variations
body:
This resourcepack replaces all cats and ocelots with Neco-Arc variations and adds sounds to them all

Variations:
- Neco-Arc (purple skirt)
- Neco-Arc (blue skirt)
- Chaos Neco-Arc
- Neco-Arc Bubbles
- Black Neco-Arc
